ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "well_name" TEXT /* Name of the well */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the well */,
  "drilling_project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the drilling project the well is part of */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the well drilling */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the well drilling */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the well (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "well_type" TEXT /* Type of well (e.g., oil, gas, exploration) */,
  "well_status_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the well status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the well was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the well was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the well was deleted (for soft deletion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_drilling_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("drilling_project_id") REFERENCES drilling_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drilling_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each drilling project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the drilling project */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* Project manager responsible for the project */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the project is located */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the project */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the project was deleted (for soft deletion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the well the log entry belongs to */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the log measurement */,
  "cali" REAL /* Caliper measurement */,
  "dt" REAL /* Sonic log measurement */,
  "dts" REAL /* Shear sonic log measurement */,
  "gr" REAL /* Gamma ray measurement */,
  "nphi" REAL /* Neutron porosity measurement */,
  "phie" REAL /* Effective porosity measurement */,
  "rhob" REAL /* Bulk density measurement */,
  "rt" REAL /* Resistivity measurement */,
  "temp" REAL /* Temperature measurement */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* Type of log entry (e.g., initial, follow-up) */,
  "log_status" TEXT /* Status of the log entry (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the log entry was deleted (for soft deletion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_logs_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formations" (
  "formation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each formation */,
  "formation_name" TEXT /* Name of the formation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the formation */,
  "top_depth" REAL /* Top depth of the formation */,
  "bottom_depth" REAL /* Bottom depth of the formation */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the well where the formation is encountered */,
  "formation_type" TEXT /* Type of formation (e.g., sandstone, shale) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the formation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the formation was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the formation was deleted (for soft deletion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("formation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_formations_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., geologist, engineer, project manager) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed for security) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was deleted (for soft deletion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well log entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the well log data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the well log data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the access event */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the access log entry was deleted (for soft deletion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES well_logs ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_log_metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well log entry the metadata belongs to */,
  "tool_name" TEXT /* Name of the tool used for the measurement */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Operator who performed the measurement */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes */,
  "metadata_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the metadata */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata entry was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metadata entry was deleted (for soft deletion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_log_metadata_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES well_logs ("log_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was deleted (for soft deletion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the permission was deleted (for soft deletion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_log_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "log_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well log entry the version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the well log data */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "deleted_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was deleted (for soft deletion) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_log_versions_log_id FOREIGN KEY ("log_id") REFERENCES well_logs ("log_id")
)
